name: Missing Persons
short_description: Missing Persons is a horror-survival game that you play as Calvin to survive against the scientist who kidnapped you to run tests on you.
detailed_description:
Experience the best indie horror-survival game with Missing Persons.

You wake up in a strange room without remembering anything. Soon it turns out you were kidnapped by a scientist that wants to run tests on you. In this adventure play as Calvin and try to survive anything the scientist throws at your way and try to make it out alive.

Key Features



First-Person Action Game: See the game from the character's view and experience the thrill and the horror firsthand.

Combat: Use deadly force if needed, but be careful with your ammo.

Loot: Make sure to loot every place you go. There will always be something to help you with your journey.

Notes: Find and inspect notes to find the secrets behind them.

Craft: Sometimes when situations go dire you can always craft required items if you have enough materials to craft them.

supported_languages:
English*, German, Czech, Polish, Turkish, Slovak, French, Italian, Spanish - Spain, Bulgarian, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Norwegian, Romanian, Swedish
*languages with full audio support
